name: image_edit
description: Edit an existing image by providing a prompt describing the desired changes, with optional mask for targeted editing.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The image to edit. Must be a valid PNG file, less than 4MB, and square.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: A text description of the desired edit.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: An additional image with transparent areas indicating where edits should be applied.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of images to generate (1-10, default 1).

request_example.body: multipart/form-data with image, prompt, and optional mask fields
